tool_args.label: MTAPD radio network antenna
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA Police Department (MTAPD) analog radio system radio network was replaced with updated equipment and technology at certain ideal locations for an expanded radio network configuration. The subject License is for one of 43 antennas for the updated MTAPD radio network.

payload.claim_text: The subject License is for one of 43 antennas for the updated MTAPD radio network.
payload.description: License renewal at 1 Fairchild Court, Plainview, NY for one of 43 antennas supporting the updated MTAPD radio network

tool_args.label: Coney Island restaurant RFP
tool_args.raw_text: The Location was publicly offered through a Request for Proposals (RFP) issued July 27, 2023.

payload.claim_text: The Location was publicly offered through a Request for Proposals (RFP) issued July 27, 2023.
payload.description: Vacant street-level space at Coney Island-Stillwell Avenue station offered via RFP

payload.claim_text: Mr. Jose M. Orea, the majority owner, and Birrialandia Corp. have very good credit and the financial resources to undertake the proposed initial improvements of at least $200,000 and pay the rent offered.
payload.description: Initial improvements commitment for the Coney Island restaurant lease

tool_args.label: MTAPD urgent parking need
tool_args.raw_text: The MTAPD is seeking to license 26 exclusive parking spaces to provide off-street parking for police vehicles due to an urgent need to cease street parking in the area.

payload.claim_text: The MTAPD is seeking to license 26 exclusive parking spaces to provide off-street parking for police vehicles due to an urgent need to cease street parking in the area.
payload.description: MTAPD parking license at 143-19 94th Avenue, Jamaica, NY

tool_args.label: Springdale Maintenance of Way facility parking
tool_args.raw_text: MNR is seeking to renew their license agreement for 35 parking spaces in support of the Springdale Maintenance of Way facility in Stamford, CT.

payload.claim_text: MNR is seeking to renew their license agreement for 35 parking spaces in support of the Springdale Maintenance of Way facility in Stamford, CT.
payload.description: Employee parking license renewal at 120 Viaduct Road, Stamford, CT
